features.name: mux_all_inputs_x_undefined
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer (mux) operation where all data inputs are connected to undefined ('x) values, which can occur when a wider selection signal selects from a narrower data source.

features.name: mux_wide_sel_narrow_data
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer where the selection signal bit-width is larger than the number of data inputs available, causing unused selection patterns to reference undefined values.
features.snippet: wire [1:0] sel; wire a, b; assign o = sel[1:0] == 2'b0 ? a : (sel[1:0] == 2'b1 ? b : 1'bx); // sel can be 2'b10 or 2'b11 with no corresponding data input

features.name: nested_mux_chain_with_x
features.description: Code should include a chain of nested multiplexer operations where inner muxes resolve to undefined values ('x) when selection logic references out-of-range indices.
